source: Atlanta Event Finder cron — 2-week couples date planner
notes: Two-week couples digest for 6/27 – 7/11/2026, weighted toward the next 14 days. Headline couples pick: Jill Scott at the Fox Theatre Fri 7/10 (slow-dance energy + full live band). Reggae pick: Buju Banton + Stephen Marley at Lakewood Sat 7/25 (bucket-list lineup). Afrobeat pick: Rum Punch Fest rooftop Sat 7/4 (rum punch + Caribbean food + skyline). Art pick: Noguchi opening week at the High starting 7/8. Comedy pick: Karlous Miller at Helium 7/17–7/19. Vegetarian pick: ATL Vegan Festival in Piedmont Park Sun 7/12. Dance pick: HANGEO Salsa & Bachata Thu 7/16 (built for couples). Date-idea pick: JazzyEats Rhythm & Roots supper club Sat 7/25 (jazz + dinner + nothing-to-plan). Calendar APIs still flaky — confirm dates/prices via the linked venue before booking.
